biotools.summary: An algorithm that utilizes a small number of genomic features to predict tissue/cell type-specific enhancer-gene interactions | Enhancer And Gene Learning Ensemble method | EAGLE: an algorithm that utilizes small number of genomic features to predict tissue/cell type specific enhancer-gene interactions | EAGLE used all six features only derived from the enhancers and gene expression datasets, without providing more information like histone modification, methylation or other enhancer-gene (EG) detection datasets

bioschemas.name: EAGLE
